assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response includes recurring weekend maintenance configuration using 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' for Saturday windows and sets start_time to '02:00' for weekend-only maintenance

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: While the response shows gcloud commands, it uses --maintenance-window-file instead of the specific --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags mentioned in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response sets up quarterly exclusions but each one is 3 months long (90 days), not respecting the 30-day maximum limit mentioned in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes a specific November audit exclusion from November 1 to December 1 with scope 'ALL_UPGRADES'

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades or mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention or recommend using Stable or Extended release channels for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The response uses a JSON file approach with --maintenance-window-file rather than individual gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not address the risks of version drift or falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
